steps.title: Use the built-in definition
steps.content: The phrase after the blank explains the meaning: the mihrab is a feature that almost all mosques include. The missing word must mean widespread or found in nearly every case.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: B means detailed or complex, C means deceptive, and D means treated as perfect. None of those meanings matches "almost all mosques include." The needed word means nearly everywhere or almost always present. The answer is A.
